title: How I make my AI Agent remember everything
summary: JavaScript Mastery demonstrates a technique for implementing persistent memory in AI agents. The approach enables agents to retain and recall information across multiple interactions and sessions.
writeup: JavaScript Mastery demonstrates a technique for giving AI agents persistent memory, so they retain and recall information across multiple interactions and sessions rather than starting fresh each time. The video covers memory systems and state persistence as the mechanism for this continuity. The key takeaway is a practical approach to building agents that remember prior context beyond a single conversation.
